subject: Re: Old Library with New Landscape
body:
The whoe platform hangs off over the large salt pond in mid air.. a view from the ocean would be ridicoulous,, the new exit at the end of the greatest library comes out facign the ugliest of st thomas views... we've created giant retaining walls where there needs to be none

----- Original Message ----
From: "Jpm6929@aol.com" <Jpm6929@aol.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Friday, October 13, 2006 5:02:01 PM
Subject: Old Library with New Landscape



 

Jeffrey, I put the new landscape in the old Library, I raised the road 
close to the portico and eliminated two others.
